overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval European-style town at dusk. The character navigates narrow cobblestone streets lined with timber-framed houses and stone buildings, passing guards and civilians before turning back through darker alleys.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval street with timber and stone buildings

events.description: guard in red armor passes very close to camera, temporarily filling frame

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the narrow cobblestone street with swords on back

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor and helmet walking toward camera with spear
civilian in brown tunic walking past on left side

entered.detail: dark wooden medieval building with steep pitched roof and overhang
grey stone structure with arched wooden doorway and small windows
wet cobblestones with moss growing between the stones
tall stone tower visible at the end of the street against pink sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow medieval street lined with timber-framed houses on the left and stone buildings on the right. The cobblestone path is wet and mossy. A guard in red armor approaches and passes close to the camera, while other civilians walk through the scene. A distant tower is visible against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town square with canal and market stalls

events.description: entering area with canal and moored wooden boat visible on right
character turns around to walk back in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking to the canal area then turns around to head back

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with tattoos walking past the camera
child standing near wooden market stall

entered.detail: wooden boat moored along the canal edge with weathered hull
wooden stall with green canvas awning and goods displayed
round wooden barrel sitting on the cobblestones

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues through the town reaching a small canal area with a moored wooden boat and market stalls. A shirtless man walks past on the left. At the end of this section, Geralt turns around to walk back, causing the camera to swing around and face the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark narrow alley with high stone walls

events.description: entering darker shaded alley with high stone walls blocking sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking back through a darker narrow passage with high walls on the right

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking toward camera
group of guards in red armor patrolling the alley ahead

entered.detail: tall grey stone wall with moss and grass growing on surface
small wooden picket fence along the right side of path
bushes and ivy hanging down from the stone walls

segments.scene_description: Walking back through a darker, narrower alley with high stone walls on the right covered in moss and vegetation. The lighting becomes significantly dimmer as the sky is blocked by the tall structures. Geralt passes a woman in a blue dress and approaches a group of guards patrolling ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark covered passage between stone buildings

events.description: entering very dark section with artificial light from wall lantern

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the dark passage toward a lit archway in the distance

entered.detail: dark stone archway leading to another street visible in distance
lit iron lantern mounted on stone wall providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The final section is a very dark narrow passage where the sky is completely blocked. A lit wall lantern on the left provides the primary light source. Geralt walks toward a distant stone archway that leads to another area, with the high stone wall now closer on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval town that transitions from a bustling, open street at dusk into a claustrophobic, dimly lit alleyway. It begins with Geralt walking along a wet cobblestone path lined with timber-framed houses and stone buildings, passing a guard in red armor and civilians under a fading sky. As the path opens into a canal area with market stalls and a moored wooden boat, the camera swings around in a wide arc as Geralt turns back toward the town. The scene then shifts into a narrower, darker alley where high mossy walls block the remaining light, leading the camera past a woman in a blue dress toward patrolling guards. Finally, the environment closes in completely within a dark passage where a single lit wall lantern casts a glow over the stone walls as Geralt approaches a distant archway.
